name: Phosphate sensor (PhoPR + CRISPRa)
shortDescription: Reports phosphate status (relevant to water-quality and eutrophication monitoring). The native B. subtilis PhoP/PhoR phosphate-starvation system gates a CRISPRa circuit driving a fluorescent reporter, in spore-forming Bacillus subtilis 168.

input.detects: Phosphate availability in water/soil (low-phosphate triggers the Pho response)
input.operatingRange: PhoPR responds across phosphate-limited to -replete transition

sensing.sensorMechanism: Under phosphate limitation the PhoR sensor kinase phosphorylates PhoP, which activates Pho-regulon promoters (e.g. PphoA/Ppst).
sensing.signalFlow: Low Pi -> PhoR/PhoP activates a Pho promoter -> transcribes an sgRNA -> dCas9-activator amplifies a fluorescent reporter (CRISPRa) -> fluorescence reports phosphate-starvation state.

parts.name: PhoP/PhoR two-component system
parts.notes: Phosphate-starvation sensor; endogenous to B. subtilis.

parts.name: Pho-regulon promoter (e.g. PphoA)
parts.notes: Activated by phospho-PhoP under low phosphate.

parts.name: Reporter-activating sgRNA
parts.source: designed for CRISPRa upstream of a weak reporter promoter

performance.limitOfDetection: PhoPR module reports the phosphate-limited transition (module-validated).
performance.notes: Reports phosphate status (inverse to abundance); integrated CRISPRa device is a design template. Best used as a relative phosphate-status reporter.

safety.notes: Spores allow ambient storage; relevant to surface-water eutrophication surveys.

buildSteps.title: Design CRISPRa sgRNA
buildSteps.description: Target the activation window of a weak reporter promoter; check B. subtilis off-targets.

buildSteps.title: Assemble units
buildSteps.description: TU1: Pho promoter -> sgRNA (native PhoPR). TU2: dCas9-omega. TU3: weak promoter -> sfGFP. Integrate at amyE/thrC.

buildSteps.title: Transform B. subtilis 168
buildSteps.description: Use natural competence; select; calibrate vs phosphate-replete/limited media.

buildSteps.title: Expose to sample
buildSteps.description: Reconstitute spores; add sample + phosphate standard curve.

buildSteps.title: Measure fluorescence
buildSteps.description: Interpolate relative phosphate from the curve.

provenance.source: Design template combining the native B. subtilis PhoPR phosphate system with CRISPRa
partsSources: Hulett et al. / B. subtilis Pho regulon (PhoP/PhoR) literature
provenance.license: Parts per their original sources; design template CC BY 4.0
